title: Lon Stanton
compiled_truth: Lon Stanton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-17 to 2002-01-25), Lon Stanton sent 8 and received 205 emails, totalling 213 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mike Mcgowan](people/mike-mcgowan) (8), [Mary Miller](people/mary-miller) (8), [Dave Neubauer](people/dave-neubauer) (8), [Drew Fossum](people/drew-fossum) (8), [Michel Nelson](people/michel-nelson) (7).
